name: FreelanceApplicationAsset
description: Assets, documents, or portfolio items linked to a freelance application package.

asset_source.description: Source of the asset (clone_verification_asset, secure_core_vault_item, uploaded_file_reference, portfolio_url, other)

asset_ref_id.description: ID or reference key from the source system

label.description: Display name or label for the asset

asset_type.description: Type of asset (document, image, link, text)

usage_purpose.description: Purpose of including this asset (e.g., verification, portfolio, case_study)

permission_status.description: Whether the autopilot has permission to share this asset (pending, granted, restricted)

attached_at.description: Timestamp when the asset was added to the package
